feature.name: Brain Alive — 10 Intelligence Features That Make 60 a Teammate
feature.description: Post-meeting auto-extract, Morning Brief 2.0, Daily Slack thread, commitment tracker, decay alerts, pre-meeting memory injection, contact intelligence in emails, coaching dashboard, pipeline sentiment ticker, win/loss patterns.

stories.title: Brain intelligence settings — per-feature toggles + cost labels
acceptance: BrainSettings.tsx gains Brain Intelligence section above existing category toggles
Three feature groups: Free (always on, no toggle), Smart (per-feature on/off), Pro (per-feature on/off)
Free group (no toggles, just labels): Commitment tracking, Decay alerts, Sentiment ticker, Coaching dashboard, Slack threading
Smart group (toggles): Post-meeting memory extraction (~2 credits/meeting), Enhanced morning brief (~1 credit/day)
Pro group (toggles): Win/loss pattern analysis (~5 credits/month), Contact intelligence in emails (free — context injection)
Settings saved to user_settings.preferences.brain_intelligence JSONB
Defaults: all Smart features ON, all Pro features ON
Credit cost shown next to each toggle as muted text
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Create extraction prompt + edge function for deal memory extraction
acceptance: New edge function supabase/functions/extract-deal-memories/index.ts created
Uses Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) — NOT Opus/Sonnet (cost control)
Checks brain_intelligence.post_meeting_extraction setting before running (skip if disabled)
Prompt extracts: commitments (owner+deadline), objections (blocker flag), signals, stakeholder roles, sentiment
Returns typed array of DealMemoryExtraction objects
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Write extracted memories to deal_memory_events + contact_memory
acceptance: extract-deal-memories writes each extracted item to deal_memory_events with correct event_type and event_category
source_type set to 'transcript' with meeting_id in source_id
Contact memory updated via updateContactFromEvent() — relationship_strength boosted
next_steps_oneliner parsed into individual commitment events with detail.owner and detail.status='pending'
Events created with deal_id=NULL if no deal linked (contact-level memory)
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Wire extract-deal-memories into meeting_ended orchestrator sequence
acceptance: New step extract-deal-memories added to meeting_ended sequence in Wave 2b
Step depends on extract-action-items (needs parsed transcript context)
Step is best-effort (errors logged, never blocks sequence)
Step passes meeting transcript + summary + contact_id + company_id to the edge function
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Add thread_ts support to send-slack-message edge function
acceptance: send-slack-message accepts optional thread_ts in request body
When thread_ts provided, chat.postMessage includes thread_ts (posts as reply)
Response includes the message's ts for chaining further replies
Existing behavior unchanged when thread_ts not provided
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create getDailyThreadTs utility for daily thread management
acceptance: New utility supabase/functions/_shared/slack/dailyThread.ts created
getDailyThreadTs(userId, orgId, supabase) finds today's thread_ts from agent_daily_logs metadata
If no thread exists for today, creates a new one via send-slack-message and stores thread_ts
Thread keyed by date (ISO date string) — new thread each day
Falls back to null if Slack unavailable (caller sends as direct DM)
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Wire morning brief to create daily thread + post-meeting to reply
acceptance: Morning brief creates daily thread and stores thread_ts via getDailyThreadTs
Post-meeting Slack summary (notify-slack-summary step) posts as reply to daily thread
If thread doesn't exist yet (no morning brief ran), creates it on first post-meeting notification
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Query Brain tables in morning brief assembleBriefing()
acceptance: assembleBriefing() queries: getOverdueCommitments() for pending commitments past deadline
Queries contact_memory for contacts with relationship_strength < 0.4
Queries deal_memory_events for deals with last sentiment_score < 0.5
Data passed to narrative prompt as structured context
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Enhance morning brief Haiku prompt with Brain insights
acceptance: Checks brain_intelligence.enhanced_morning_brief setting — if disabled, uses standard brief (no Brain queries)
Haiku narrative prompt includes: Commitments slipping, Contacts going cold, Deals at risk sections
Brief prioritizes actionable nudges over informational summaries
Up to 3 specific contact/deal-named action items in output
CC item created with item_type morning_brief containing the full brief
Posts to daily Slack thread
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create check-commitment-deadlines cron edge function
acceptance: New edge function supabase/functions/check-commitment-deadlines/index.ts
Scans deal_memory_events for commitment_made with detail.deadline < NOW()+48h and detail.status=pending
Separates into overdue (past deadline) and approaching (within 48h) buckets
Checks proactive_agent_config.is_enabled and user opt-out before processing each org
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Wire commitment alerts to Slack thread + CC items + cron schedule
acceptance: Overdue commitments fire Slack alert via daily thread with deal/contact names and days overdue
Approaching commitments fire gentle nudge in daily thread
CC item created with urgency high for overdue, normal for approaching
Migration creates pg_cron schedule for daily 9am UTC execution
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Enhance runRelationshipDecay to return threshold-crossing contacts
acceptance: runRelationshipDecay() return type extended to include crossedBelow: ContactMemory[]
Contacts whose relationship_strength dropped below 0.4 during this run captured
Existing decay logic unchanged — new data is additive
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create decay alert edge function with Slack + CC delivery
acceptance: New edge function check-contact-decay/index.ts runs decay + fires alerts
Groups multiple decaying contacts into one Slack message (not spam)
Each contact shows: name, company, days since last interaction, strength %
CC item created with item_type decay_alert and suggested re-engagement actions
Wired to existing weekly decay cron schedule
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Inject Brain memory context into pre-meeting prep
acceptance: proactive-meeting-prep queries contact_memory, copilot_memories, deal_memory_events for meeting contact
Prep output includes What the Brain knows section: relationship strength, open commitments, last sentiment, coaching tips
Falls back to standard prep if no Brain data exists (no errors)
Posts to daily Slack thread
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Add contact intelligence to copilot email drafts
acceptance: copilot-autonomous fetches contact_memory + copilot_memories when composing emails (contact resolved from thread)
CONTACT INTELLIGENCE block injected into system prompt — max 500 tokens
Adapts: formal/casual tone, length, known objections to preempt, re-engagement warmth for low strength
Existing behavior unchanged when no contact intelligence exists
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create useCoachingPatterns hook — aggregate talk time vs sentiment
acceptance: New hook src/lib/hooks/useCoachingPatterns.ts
Queries meetings with talk_time_rep_pct and sentiment_score for the org
Computes: avg sentiment at <45% talk, 45-55% talk, >55% talk
Aggregates top 3 strengths and top 3 improvements from coach_summary JSON
Uses React Query with 5-minute stale time
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Build BrainCoaching tab — scatter chart + pattern cards
acceptance: New component src/components/brain/BrainCoaching.tsx
Recharts ScatterChart: talk_time_rep_pct (x) vs sentiment_score (y) with color coding
Summary card: Your avg sentiment is X when talk time <45% vs Y when >55%
Top 3 strengths and improvements shown as cards with meeting count evidence
Wired into BrainPage as new Coaching tab
Empty state when no coaching data exists
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Create usePipelineSentiment hook — latest sentiment per deal
acceptance: New hook src/lib/hooks/usePipelineSentiment.ts
Queries most recent meeting sentiment per company/deal for active pipeline
Computes: overall avg, 7-day trend (current vs prior 7 days), count trending negative
Returns typed PipelineSentiment object
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Build PipelineSentimentTicker component on Brain page header
acceptance: New component src/components/brain/PipelineSentimentTicker.tsx
Shows: overall sentiment avg, trend arrow (up/down), count of deals trending negative
Traffic light: <0.5 red, 0.5-0.7 amber, >0.7 green
Positioned on Brain page header below title
Clicking a deal navigates to deal detail
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Create win/loss pattern extraction edge function
acceptance: New edge function generate-win-loss-patterns/index.ts
Uses Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) for pattern synthesis — NOT Opus
Checks brain_intelligence.win_loss_patterns setting — skip if disabled
Queries deals with status won/lost + linked meetings with coaching data
For won: extracts common strengths, avg talk_time, avg sentiment
For lost: extracts common improvements, avg talk_time, common objections
Produces You win when and You lose when pattern summaries
Stores patterns in copilot_memories category=fact
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Add win/loss patterns section to BrainCoaching tab
acceptance: BrainCoaching.tsx gains Win/Loss Patterns section below scatter chart
Shows You win when cards (green) and You lose when cards (red)
Each card shows: pattern summary, evidence count, avg metrics
Generate Patterns button triggers edge function on-demand
Loading state while generating
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

parallelGroups.reason: Foundation: intelligence settings + extraction fn + thread_ts + daily thread utility
Wiring: orchestrator step + morning brief thread creation
Data layer: morning brief queries + commitment scanner + decay enhancement
Delivery: enhanced prompts + alerts to Slack/CC + memory injection
Analytics UI: coaching dashboard + sentiment ticker (independent)
Pattern recognition: needs coaching data aggregated
